findings.title: Filing of Transmission Service Agreements
findings.summary: PSE did not file four non-conforming transmission service agreements with the Commission within 30 days after electric service had commenced, as required by 18 C.F.R. §§ 35.1(g) and 35.3(a)(2).

recommendations.text: Develop procedures for reviewing and filing transmission service agreements to ensure PSE has the most current and complete agreements on file with the Commission.
Train employees on filing procedures developed from Recommendation 1 on an ongoing, as needed basis.

findings.title: Posting of Transmission Service Request Study Metrics Reports
findings.summary: PSE did not timely post several quarterly transmission service study metrics reports on OASIS during the audit period, as required by 18 CFR § 37.6(h)(2).

recommendations.text: Enhance cross-office coordination practices and develop procedures to ensure timely posting of quarterly transmission service study metrics reports on OASIS.
Train employees on procedures developed from Recommendation 3 on an ongoing, as needed basis. E.
